introductions.pitch_30s: Hi, I'm Haolun. I focus on TypeScript full-stack development, mainly using Angular and NestJS. I am currently studying Computer Science at NCUT while working as an IT Intern and participating in web system development.
introductions.pitch_1min: Hi, I am a IT Intern and a Computer Science student at National Chin-Yi University of Technology. With two years of experience in TypeScript, I specialize in full-stack development using Angular (Standalone Components) and NestJS. I am proficient in leveraging Docker to optimize deployment and development workflows. My expertise lies in independent feature development, debugging, and system maintenance, with a strong focus on delivering high-quality, production-ready solutions.

items: Resume website: Developed using Angular framework, featuring bilingual (EN/ZH) switching and responsive design. Version controlled via GitHub Repository and deployed via Cloudflare Pages & Workers for global distribution.
Angular + NestJS full-stack development including API integration, deployment workflows, Git-based version control, Docker containerization, and GitHub Actions CI/CD automation.

profile.name: 王顥倫
profile.title: 軟體工程師 / IT 實習生

introductions.pitch_30s: 你好，我是顥倫，專注於 TypeScript 全端開發，主要使用 Angular 與 NestJS。目前在勤益資工就讀，同時擔任 IT 實習生，持續參與 Web 系統開發。
introductions.pitch_1min: 你好，我是王顥倫，目前就讀於勤益科技大學資訊工程系，並擔任 IT 實習生。擁有 兩年 TypeScript 開發經驗，深耕於 Angular（獨立元件架構） 與 NestJS 框架的完整開發流程。我擅長利用 Docker 優化部署與開發環境，並具備獨立處理功能開發、系統除錯與維護的能力，致力於打造高品質、可落地的技術解決方案。

items: 履歷網站：使用 Angular 框架開發，實現中英切換、響應式設計；使用 GitHub Repository 版控，使用 Cloudflare Pages & Workers 進行全球部署。
Angular + NestJS 全端專案：實作 API 串接、Docker 容器化、Git 版本控管、GitHub Actions CI/CD 自動化佈署與完整的部署流程。
